name: Mid-Market Must Flex More Muscle in IT Outsourcing
description: Aberdeen Market Segment report analyzing IT outsourcing practices at mid-size enterprises versus Best in Class organizations. Key finding: 25% of mid-market respondents admitted their companies have not been successful with IT outsourcing; none of the Best in Class cited lack of success. Report analyzes four stages prone to planning errors: creation of quantitative business case, contract pricing negotiations, governance, and ongoing operational management. Best in Class outperform mid-market across all four stages. Three recommendations: (1) Get the RFP right — know requirements, costs, and desired advantages; (2) Don't be afraid to look outside for help — use independent consultants and legal assistance; (3) Improve relationship management — dedicate management time and hold one person accountable for the outsourcing relationship.
